decisions.reason: Exact lessee/company identity for BTCT4 LLC d/b/a Beer Table. Both records cite the same Grand Central Madison retail lease identity; the target is the richer vendor record.
Exact company identity for Birrialandia Corp. Both records name the same lessee/company for the Coney Island-Stillwell Avenue station restaurant lease.
Exact LLC identity for Dover Greens, LLC. Both records identify the same Metro-North licensor for the Wingdale parking parcel.
Exact joint-venture identity for East Harlem Community Collaborators JV. Both records cite the same Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 community outreach services provider.
Exact company/vendor identity for GE Grid Solutions LLC. Both records identify the same supplier for PTC data radios.
Exact contractor/company identity for GE Grid Solutions LLC. The alias and target identify the same PTC data radio supplier, with the target carrying the fuller merged vendor payload.

Exact development-corporation identity for Greater Jamaica Development Corporation/GJDC. Both records identify the lessor for relocated Jamaica Bus Terminal lease context; the target is the richer active GJDC record.
Exact organization identity for Greater Jamaica Development Corporation. The alias and target both identify the GJDC/Jamaica Bus Terminal lessor context.
Exact fare-collection vendor identity for Scheidt & Bachmann USA. The spelling variation is covered by the shared identity key, and both records refer to the LIRR/MNR fare collection solution vendor.
Exact LLC identity for Terwilliger Bartone Properties, LLC. Both records identify the same LIRR Westbury Station walkway licensee.

deferred_low_confidence_or_scope_review: Skipped broad MTA/NYCT/agency/committee/program/team/office labels and government-body clusters.
Skipped Cubic/Cubic Transportation hierarchy-style candidates because corporate parent/subsidiary identity needs separate owner judgment.

Skipped prior-batch target churn candidates such as Donna Mason and Donald Look, even where exact person evidence exists, to keep batch050 cleanly independent of pending generated-output checkpoint effects.
Skipped exact-looking candidates whose cited blocks did not provide enough value-bearing support after raw block inspection.
commands_run_for_this_prep: sqlite3 data/canonical.db "select count(*) as identity_aliases from identity_aliases; select count(*) as do_not_merge from do_not_merge; pragma quick_check;"
sqlite3 data/canonical.db ".schema records" && sqlite3 data/canonical.db ".schema evidence_refs" && sqlite3 data/canonical.db ".schema record_aliases"
sqlite3 data/canonical.db "select record_kind, count(*) from records group by record_kind order by record_kind;"

sqlite3 -json data/canonical.db "with active_records as (select r.* from records r left join identity_aliases ia on ia.kind=r.record_kind and ia.alias=r.record_id where r.record_kind='entity' and ia.alias is null), alias_groups as (select ra.alias as identity_key, count(distinct ra.record_id) as n from record_aliases ra join active_records r on r.record_id=ra.record_id where length(ra.alias)>3 group by ra.alias having n>1) select ag.identity_key, ag.n, json_group_array(json_object('record_id',r.record_id,'display_name',r.display_name,'payload',json(r.payload),'evidence',(select json_group_array(source_id||'#'||block_id) from evidence_refs er where er.record_id=r.record_id))) as records from alias_groups ag join record_aliases ra on ra.alias=ag.identity_key join active_records r on r.record_id=ra.record_id group by ag.identity_key order by ag.n desc, ag.identity_key limit 120;"

sqlite3 -json data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where kind='entity' order by alias limit 5; select kind, left_record_id, right_record_id from do_not_merge where kind='entity' limit 5;"
bun - <<'EOF' <deterministic DB-backed compact duplicate candidate miner over records, record_aliases, identity_aliases, do_not_merge, and merges.json> EOF

sqlite3 -json data/canonical.db "with selected(id) as (values ('entity_meeting-doc-206081-beer-table'),('entity_beer-table-llc-meeting-doc-205671'),('entity_meeting-doc-133366-birrialandia-corp'),('entity_birrialandia-corp-meeting-doc-133406'),('entity_meeting-doc-206081-dover-greens'),('entity_dover-greens-meeting-doc-205671'),('entity_meeting-doc-206081-east-harlem-collaborators'),('entity_east-harlem-community-collaborators-jv-206071'),('entity_meeting157646-ge-grid-solutions'),('entity_meeting-doc-155486-ge-grid'),('entity_ge-grid-solutions-157686'),('entity_meeting-doc-104796-gjdc'),('entity_meeting-doc-129081-greater-jamaica-dev'),('entity_greater-jamaica-dev-corp'),('entity_scheidt-bachmann-usa'),('entity_meeting-doc-129051-scheidt-bachman'),('entity_meeting-doc-129051-terwilliger-bartone'),('entity_meeting-doc-129081-terwilliger-bartone')) select r.record_id,r.display_name,json(r.payload) as payload,(select json_group_array(source_id||'#'||block_id) from evidence_refs er where er.record_id=r.record_id) as refs,(select json_group_array(alias) from record_aliases ra where ra.record_id=r.record_id) as identity_keys from records r join selected s on s.id=r.record_id order by r.record_id;"

for ref in meeting_doc_206081#p053_c0007 meeting_doc_205671#p011_c0007 meeting_doc_133366#p001_c0003 meeting_doc_133406#p008_c0008 meeting_doc_206081#p050_c0008 meeting_doc_205671#p008_c0008 meeting_doc_206081#p041_c0004 meeting_doc_206071#p054_c0007 meeting_doc_157646#p011_c0013 meeting_doc_157686#p004_c0003 meeting_doc_155486#p036_c0005 meeting_doc_157686#p004_c0003 meeting_doc_104796#p004_c0003 meeting_doc_124346#p093_c0008 meeting_doc_129081#p044_c0010 meeting_doc_124346#p093_c0008 meeting_doc_140481#p005_c0007 meeting_doc_129051#p001_c0003 meeting_doc_129051#p001_c0003 meeting_doc_129081#p055_c0008; do src=${ref%%#*}; block=${ref#*#}; printf '%s\\t' "$ref"; jq -r --arg block "$block" 'select(.block_id==$block) | ((.text // .content // .raw_text // "") | gsub("[\\r\\n]+"; " ") | .[0:220])' "raw/sources/$src/blocks.jsonl"; done

for block in p005_c0007 p008_c0003 p008_c0006; do printf '%s\\t' "$block"; jq -r --arg block "$block" 'select(.block_id==$block) | .text' raw/sources/meeting_doc_140481/blocks.jsonl | rg -i 'Scheidt|Bachm|USA|fare collection' || true; done

for src in meeting_doc_133366 meeting_doc_104796 meeting_doc_157646 meeting_doc_140481 meeting_doc_129051; do echo "$src"; rg -n -i 'Birrialandia|Greater Jamaica|GJDC|GE Grid|Grid Solutions|Scheidt|Bachm|Terwilliger|Bartone' raw/sources/$src/blocks.jsonl | head -20; done

bun - <<'EOF' <deterministic final exact guard script for all intended batch050 aliases: canonical record presence, aliases not already in merges or identity_aliases, targets not aliases, do-not-merge hits, shared identity keys, raw blocks, and source-page blocks> EOF
conductor_apply_note: This prep artifact intentionally does not edit data/identity-overrides/merges.json or generated outputs. Re-run the deterministic guards immediately before conductor application because batches048-049 are applied durably but still pending generated-output checkpoint behind wave24.
